title: Mwyngloddfa Castell
summary: Mwyngloddfa Castell is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Ceredigion,  west Wales. The two special features are metal tolerant (Metallophyte) Lichens and mineral veins exposed in mines and tunnels.
text: Mwyngloddfa Castell is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Ceredigion,  west Wales. The two special features are metal tolerant (Metallophyte) Lichens and mineral veins exposed in mines and tunnels.
